app.name: DomestIQ
app.tagline: Tsela e e babalesegileng le e e botlhale ya go golaganya badiri le malwapa
search.title: Batla Badiri
search.no_results: Ga go na badiri ba ba fitlhetsweng
consent.title: Tumelelo ya Poraefesi
consent.message: Re kokoanya le go dirisa tshedimosetso ya gago ya sebele go ya ka POPI Act. Ka go tswelela, o dumelana le ditlwaelo tsa rena tsa tshedimosetso.
landing.hero.badge: E agilwe bakeng sa Mzansi. E agilwe bakeng sa rona.
landing.hero.subtext: Batho ba ba bolokang malwapa a Aforika Borwa a a šoma ba tshwanelwa ke go feta go ikaega ka puo ya molomo. DomestIQ e golaganya badiri le malwapa ka tlhamalalo — ka diporofaele tse di netefaditsweng, ditlhatlhobo tsa nnete, le badiri ba boloka madi otlhe a ba a dirileng.
landing.hero.cta_client: Ke Tlhoka Mongwe yo ke ka mo Tshepang
landing.problem.waiting_title: Ba emetse mogala o o ka seng wa tla
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Badiri ba ba nang le bokgoni ba dula diura kwa ntle ga dikgoro tsa dipolase, ba solofetse gore mongwe o tla ba tlhoka gompieno.
landing.problem.door_title: Ba bulela moeng yo ba sa mo itseng
landing.problem.door_desc: Ga go na ID, ga go na ditlhatlhobo, ga go na ditšhupo. O tshwanetse go tshepa fela gore motho ke ene a reng ke ene.
landing.problem.cash_title: Ba duelwa go le gonnye — go se na tsela ya go ipuela
landing.problem.cash_desc: Ga go na bopaki jo bo kwadilweng. Ga go na bopaki jwa tiro e e dirilweng. Fa madi a haella, go fedile fela.
landing.worker.heading_1: Tiro ya gago e na le boleng.
landing.worker.body: Ga o tlhole o dula o emetse. Ga o tlhole o simolola lefelong la ntlha nako le nako fa o latlhegelwa ke modirisi. Aga porofaele ya gago gangwe fela — ditlhatlhobo tsa gago, ditšhupo, le leina la gago di go latela gongwe le gongwe.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Ditiro di tla mo mogaleng wa gago. Ga o tlhole o ema kwa dikgorong kgotsa o botsa.
landing.worker.b2_title: Leina la Gago le a go Latela
landing.worker.b2_desc: Tiro nngwe le nngwe e e siameng e amogela tlhatlhobo. Tlhatlhobo nngwe le nngwe e tlisa tiro e e latelang. Ga o ke o simolola lefelong la ntlha gape.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Badirisi le bone ba netefaditswe. Bona gore o ya kwa go mang pele o fitlha.
landing.worker.b4_desc: Ikwadise ka mogala wa gago fela. Tobetsa ditshwantsho o tlhophe bokgoni jwa gago — ga go kwala, ga go na difomo.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Dirisa DomestIQ ka Setswana, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans — dipuo tsotlhe tse 11 tsa SA.
landing.worker.b6_title: O Boloka Ranta Nngwe le Nngwe
landing.worker.b6_desc: Ga re ke re tsaya sengwe mo go se o se dirileng. E seng jaanong, e seng ka gope.
landing.worker.b7_desc: O itse mongwe yo o siameng? Abelana ka khoutu ya gago. Fa ba tsena, lo babedi lo a amogela.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Aga CV ya porofešenale go tswa mo porofaeleng ya gago. Tsenya PDF o e dirise gongwe le gongwe — ke ya gago.
landing.cv.badge: Mahala bakeng sa Modiri Mongwe le Mongwe
landing.cv.body: Bokgoni jwa gago, hisetori ya tiro, le ditlhatlhobo tsa gago — di fetotswe tokomane e e siameng eo o ka e nayang mongwe le mongwe. E seng ya DomestIQ fela. Ke ya gago.
landing.cv.step1: Re tsaya dintlha tsa gago go tswa mo porofaeleng ya gago
landing.cv.step2: O e lebelela mo sekerineng sa gago
landing.cv.portable: CV ya gago e šoma gongwe le gongwe. E gatise. E romele ka imeile. E neele kwa kgorong.
landing.client.heading_1: Itse gore ke mang a a tsenang
landing.client.body: Di-ID tse di netefaditsweng. Ditlhatlhobo tsa lenaneo la botshelo. Ditlhatlhobo tsa nnete tse di tswang mo malwapeng a a tshwanang le la gago. Tlogela go ikaega ka tsala ya tsala o simolole go hira ka kitso ya mmatota.
landing.client.b1_desc: Modiri mongwe le mongwe a ka netefatsa ID ya SA le phitlhelelo ya bosenyi. O bona baetšhe pele o buka.
landing.client.b2_desc: Dikelo tse di tswang mo malwapeng a mmatota. Ditšhupo tse di kwadilweng tse o ka di balang pele o tsaya tshwetso.
landing.client.b3_desc: Bona badiri mo tikologong ya gago, ba rulagantswe ka sekgala. Fitlhela mongwe gaufi le wena.
landing.client.b4_desc: Gangwe fela kgotsa ka go bušeletša. Tlhopha letlha, tlhopha nako, romela kopo. Go weditswe.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Tobetsa ditshwantsho go tlhopha bokgoni jwa gago. Ga go tlhokege go kwala, ga go difomo, ga go tlhokege imeile.
landing.how.ws2_title: O fitlhelwa ke malwapa gaufi le wena
landing.how.ws2_desc: Porofaele ya gago, kelo, le go nna teng ga gago go bonala fa batho ba batla mo tikologong ya gago.
landing.how.ws3_title: Tlhopha ditiro tse o di batlang
landing.how.ws3_desc: Amogela kgotsa gana. Beya dituelo le šetšulo ya gago. O a ilaola.
landing.how.ws4_title: Gola ka tiro nngwe le nngwe
landing.how.ws4_desc: Tiro e e siameng e amogela ditlhatlhobo. Ditlhatlhobo di tlisa dibukelo tse dintsi. Go a gola.
landing.how.client_title: Fa o tlhoka thuso mo gae
landing.how.cs1_desc: Sefa ka se o se tlhokang, sekgala, le kelo.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Bala ditlhatlhobo, bona dibaetšhe tsa netefatso, lebelela hisetori ya tiro.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Romela kopo kgotsa buisana pele. Rulaganyeng dintlha magareng ga lona.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Kelo ya gago e thusa badiri ba ba siameng go bonwa. E boloka setšhaba se le mo boikanyegong.
landing.services.heading_2: Bokgoni jotlhe jo o bo tlhokang.
landing.services.subtext: Go simolola ka thuso ya ka ntlong ya letsatsi le letsatsi go ya go ditiro tsa bokgoni. Badiri ba kwadisa se ba se dirang. O fitlhela tota ene yo o mo tlhokang.
landing.stories.s1_quote: Ke ne ke ema dibeke magareng ga ditiro. Jaanong ke bona dibukelo beke nngwe le nngwe. Bana ba me ba ka ja sentle.
landing.stories.s2_quote: Ga ke kgone go buisa sentle mme ditshwantsho di dira gore go nne motlhofo. Ke ikwadisitse ka bonna. Ga ke a tlhoka thuso.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Pele, ke ne ke se na bopaki jwa gore ke dira sentle. Jaanong ditlhatlhobo tsa me di bua bakeng sa me. Badirisi ba ntshepile pele ke fitlha.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Go bona mothusi yo o ikanyegang go ne go raya go botsa ditsala le go solofela se se molemo. Ga go tlhole go le jalo.
landing.stories.s5_quote: Ke itse gore ke mang a a tlang mo ntlong ya me. Fa o na le bana, seo se botlhokwa go feta sengwe le sengwe.
landing.stories.s6_quote: Ke beile dituelo tsa me ka bonna. Ga go na ope a a tsayang sengwe. Ke dirile R8,000 kgwedi e e fetileng ka DomestIQ fela.
landing.cta.heading_1: Aforika Borwa e tsamaisiwa ke tiro ya mo gae.
landing.cta.heading_2: Go fitlhile nako gore e direle botlhe.
landing.cta.body: Modiri mongwe le mongwe yo o agang porofaele o tlhola bopaki jwa bokgoni jwa gagwe. Lelwapa lengwe le lengwe le le bukelang ka DomestIQ le aga boitshepo mo thulaganyong. Re e baakanya ka tsela e — kgolagano e le nngwe e e netefaditsweng ka nako.
landing.cta.pill1: Badiri ba boloka 100% ya dituelo tsa bone
landing.cta.pill2: Netefatso ya ID le lenaneo la botshelo
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ ke lefelo la go golaganya fela. Ga go na kamano ya khiro e e dirwang magareng ga badirisi.
landing.trust.t1_desc: Tshedimosetso ya gago e sireletsegile ka molao wa SA
landing.trust.t2_title: Badiri ba ba Netefaditsweng ka ID
landing.trust.t2_desc: ID ya SA e tlhatlhobilwe ke setlhopha sa rona
landing.trust.t3_desc: Buisana ka polokesego ka lefelo le — ga go na dinomoro tsa motho tse di aroganwang
landing.trust.t4_desc: Setifikeiti sa phitlhelelo ya bosenyi se netefaditswe
landing.trust.t5_desc: Neteweke e e golang mo SA yotlhe
landing.trust.t6_desc: Kelo ya palogare ya go kgotsofala ga badiri
landing.faq.q1: A DomestIQ ke mahala tota bakeng sa badiri?
landing.faq.a1: Ee. Badiri ba boloka ranta nngwe le nngwe e ba e dirileng — ga re ke re tsaya khomišene. Lefelo le tshegediwa ke tuelo e nnye ya tirelo e e duediwang ke malwapa fa ba buka.
landing.faq.a2: Mogala ope o o ka tsenang inthanete o a šoma. DomestIQ e šoma mo seporauseng — Android kgotsa iPhone. Ga go tlhokege go tsenya aepe. O ka e tsenya le mo sekerineng sa gae jaaka aepe.
landing.faq.a3: Badiri ba tsenya ID ya SA le setifikeiti sa phitlhelelo ya bosenyi. Setlhopha sa rona se netefatsa ditokomane se be se naye baetšhe ya gauta. Badiri ba ba netefaditsweng ba bona dibukelo tse di oketsegileng.
landing.faq.q4: A tshedimosetso ya me e babalesegileng?
landing.faq.a4: Ka botlalo. E obamela POPIA. Tshedimosetso ya gago e entšhekripthilwe, ga e ke e rekisediwa batho, e bile e aroganwa fela ka tumelelo ya gago.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, le ditoropo tse di oketsegileng kgwedi le kgwedi. Ikwadise jaanong le fa karolo ya gago e ise e bidiwe — re atolosa ka bonako.
landing.faq.a6: Batla modiri, lebelela porofaele le ditlhatlhobo, o kope letlha le nako. Modiri o amogela kgotsa o gana. O ka buisana le ene pele go rulaganya dintlha.
landing.faq.q7: A nka buka modiri bakeng sa tiro ya gangwe fela?
landing.faq.a7: Ee — gangwe fela kgotsa ka go bušeletša, bobedi bo a šoma. O tlhoka go phepafatsa ka boteng ka Lamatlhatso kgotsa motlhami wa tshingwana wa beke le beke? Tsela epe.
landing.faq.a8: Dipuo tsotlhe tse 11 tsa semmuso tsa SA — Seesemane, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Seaforikanse, Sesotho, le tse dingwe. Badiri ba ka ikwadisa le go buisana ka puo ya bone e ba e ratang.
landing.cities.subtext: Badiri le malwapa ba golagana mo ditoropong tse dikgolo. Ditoropo tse dintsi kgwedi le kgwedi.
landing.cities.not_listed: Ga o bone toropo ya gago? Ikwadise le go ntse jalo — re atolosa ka bonako.
landing.counters.heading_1: E gola ka letsatsi le letsatsi mo
landing.pwa.title: Tsenya DomestIQ mo Sekerineng sa Gae
landing.pwa.desc: Bona phitlhelelo e e bonako ya dibukelo, melaetsa, le tse dingwe.
landing.pwa.ios_step2: Mme o tlhophe "Tsenya mo Sekerineng sa Gae"
